author: Besting
text: BOOTSTRAP SOURCE — pin this first (highest-priority detail): the default-config/ contents must be EMBEDDED in the bl binary at compile time (include_dir!/include_str!), written out on first prime when $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/balls/default-config/ is ABSENT; the XDG folder is an OPTIONAL override (org/user customization). Otherwise a fresh `cargo install` or a test binary run from /tmp has no seed and prime fails — reintroducing 'you need a script to get set up,' the exact thing this design removes. So: bootstrap = embedded default; XDG default-config/ = override-if-present.
